methods.description: Preparation of BP suspension for experimental use by dissolving BP in distilled water, followed by centrifugation and filtration.

steps.description: A suspension of 280 g BP dissolved in 10 ml distilled water was prepared as previously described.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare BP suspension by dissolving in distilled water

steps.description: Following overnight storage, centrifugation (10,000 rpm/10 °C/45 min), and filtration of supernatant, the obtained filtrate was frozen (− 20 °C) until use.
steps.searchable_summary: centrifuge and filter BP suspension, then freeze filtrate

methods.description: Design and execution of an animal study to assess the effects of fluvastatin and other treatments on rats.

steps.description: Fifty adult female Sprague Dawley rats were obtained and housed under standard environmental conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain and house rats under controlled conditions

steps.description: Rats were randomly divided into five groups and treated with fluvastatin and other substances as per group specifications.
steps.searchable_summary: divide rats into groups and administer treatments

steps.description: At the end of the experiment, rats were anesthetized and blood samples were collected.
steps.searchable_summary: anesthetize rats and collect blood samples

steps.description: Livers were excised and divided into portions for various analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: excise and divide livers for analysis

methods.description: Analysis of liver damage enzymes and antioxidant markers in serum and liver homogenates.

steps.description: Liver damage enzymes were determined in serum using commercially available kits.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze liver damage enzymes in serum

steps.description: Levels of lipid peroxidation marker and antioxidant enzymes were determined in liver homogenates.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze lipid peroxidation and antioxidant enzymes in liver homogenates

methods.description: Examination of liver specimens for histopathological alterations using staining and scoring methods.

steps.description: Fixed liver specimens were dehydrated, cleared, embedded, sectioned, and stained.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare liver specimens for histopathological examination

steps.description: Histopathological alterations were determined in randomly chosen fields.
steps.searchable_summary: determine histopathological alterations in liver sections

methods.description: Immunostaining of liver specimens to quantify collagen I positive staining area.

steps.description: Sections were incubated with serum, primary antibody, secondary antibody, and chromogen.
COLI positive staining area was quantified using an image analyzer.
steps.searchable_summary: quantify collagen I staining area in liver sections

methods.description: Determination of relative hepatic expression of inflammation-related genes using qPCR.

steps.description: Total RNA was extracted from liver tissues using a commercially available kit.
RNA was reverse transcribed into cDNA.
qPCR was performed to determine gene expression levels.
steps.searchable_summary: perform qPCR to analyze gene expression

methods.description: Detection of TNFα and IL10 protein expression in liver tissues using western blot assay.

steps.description: Liver specimens were lysed and proteins were separated on SDS-PAGE gels.
steps.searchable_summary: lyse liver tissues and separate proteins on SDS-PAGE

steps.description: Proteins were transferred to PVDF membrane and incubated with antibodies.
steps.searchable_summary: transfer proteins to PVDF and incubate with antibodies

steps.description: Color was developed and band density was quantified.
steps.searchable_summary: develop color and quantify band density
